case_title: RICHARD MORGAN VS. CAROLINA ARACELY JEREZ

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-23-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-29-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-23-2011 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-30-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL-BECAUSE LEGAL PAPERWORK THAT IS NOT WORK RELATED IS NOT ALLOWED ON POST OFFICE GROUNDS". FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORGAN, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT JEREZ, CAROLINA ARACELY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
